intro: Tarenna stellulata, also known as star anise tree, is a plant species within the Rubiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its purported health benefits of reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. The bioactive constituents of Tarenna stellulata include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are thought to contribute to its medicinal properties.
